hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"Auto-recording to the knowledge base before this context is compacted.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"STANDING INSTRUCTION FROM BRYSON: Before context is compacted, capture every unrecorded decision, status change, gotcha, credential or env-var NAME (never a value), and completed setup step from this session as task-keyed entries under knowledge/ (add or update knowledge/<slug>.md), then run `node knowledge/build-index.cjs` and commit + push. hooks.statusMessage: Flushing session notes to the knowledge base...
